extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked solo with approximately 5km remaining on Prati di Tivo, held off a late chase from YATES by 6 seconds.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR launched his winning move before 5km to go, forcing rivals to close individually rather than organize pursuit.
YATES attacked from the chase group late despite struggling previous days, suggesting recovery gamble or team directive shift.
THOMAS initiated early moves before summit, probing POGAČAR's response threshold and isolating him from UAE teammates early.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: won alone after long solo effort despite visibly suffering, indicating superior time-trial capacity on extended mountain finishes
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: recovered from being dropped in previous stages to finish second via late attack, showing volatile day-to-day form
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: limited to chase group finish, suggesting this climb gradient/length exceeds his uphill offensive capabilities
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: positive: finished third by one second over LANDA, demonstrating sharp finishing kick after prolonged climbing effort
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: marked favorites throughout but lacked acceleration in final kilometer to challenge for podium positions
rider_signals.ALMEIDA João: neutral: pursued early moves but absorbed back, confirming role as domestique rather than protected GC option
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: initiated early attacks but faded completely before summit, caught from breakaway suggesting poor recovery or illness
